channel.title: dwf — recent CVEs
channel.description: Most recent CVEs assigned by dwf (dwf).

item.title: CVE-2017-1002201
item.description: In haml versions prior to version 5.0.0.beta.2, when using user input to perform tasks on the server, characters like < > " ' must be escaped properly. In this case, the ' character was missed. An attacker can manipulate the input to introduce additi…

item.title: CVE-2019-1020002
item.description: Pterodactyl before 0.7.14 with 2FA allows credential sniffing.

item.title: CVE-2019-1020004
item.description: Tridactyl before 1.16.0 allows fake key events.

item.title: CVE-2019-1020007
item.description: Dependency-Track before 3.5.1 allows XSS.

item.title: CVE-2019-1020009
item.description: Fleet before 2.1.2 allows exposure of SMTP credentials.

item.title: CVE-2019-1020008
item.description: stacktable.js before 1.0.4 allows XSS.

item.title: CVE-2019-1020006
item.description: invenio-app before 1.1.1 allows host header injection.

item.title: CVE-2019-1020005
item.description: invenio-communities before 1.0.0a20 allows XSS.

item.title: CVE-2019-1020003
item.description: invenio-records before 1.2.2 allows XSS.

item.title: CVE-2019-1020019
item.description: invenio-previewer before 1.0.0a12 allows XSS.

item.title: CVE-2019-1020018
item.description: Discourse before 2.3.0 and 2.4.x before 2.4.0.beta3 lacks a confirmation screen when logging in via an email link.

item.title: CVE-2019-1020017
item.description: Discourse before 2.3.0 and 2.4.x before 2.4.0.beta3 lacks a confirmation screen when logging in via a user-api OTP.

item.title: CVE-2019-1020016
item.description: ASH-AIO before 2.0.0.3 allows an open redirect.

item.title: CVE-2019-1020015
item.description: graphql-engine (aka Hasura GraphQL Engine) before 1.0.0-beta.3 mishandles the audience check while verifying JWT.

item.title: CVE-2019-1020014
item.description: docker-credential-helpers before 0.6.3 has a double free in the List functions.

item.title: CVE-2019-1020013
item.description: parse-server before 3.6.0 allows account enumeration.

item.title: CVE-2019-1020012
item.description: parse-server before 3.4.1 allows DoS after any POST to a volatile class.

item.title: CVE-2019-1020011 · 9 CRITICAL
item.description: SmokeDetector intentionally does automatic deployments of updated copies of SmokeDetector without server operator authority.

item.title: CVE-2019-1020010
item.description: Misskey before 10.102.4 allows hijacking a user's token.

item.title: CVE-2019-1020001
item.description: yard before 0.9.20 allows path traversal.

item.title: CVE-2019-1010147
item.description: Yellowfin Smart Reporting All Versions Prior to 7.3 is affected by: Incorrect Access Control - Privileges Escalation. The impact is: Victim attacked and access admin functionality through their browser and control browser. The component is: MIAdminSt…

item.title: CVE-2019-1010127
item.description: VCFTools vcftools prior to version 0.1.15 is affected by: Use-after-free. The impact is: Denial of Service or possibly other impact (eg. code execution or information disclosure). The component is: The header::add_FILTER_descriptor method in header.c…

item.title: CVE-2019-1010161
item.description: perl-CRYPT-JWT 0.022 and earlier is affected by: Incorrect Access Control. The impact is: bypass authentication. The component is: JWT.pm for JWT security token, line 614 in _decode_jws(). The attack vector is: network connectivity(crafting user-cont…

item.title: CVE-2019-1010172
item.description: Jsish 2.4.84 2.0484 is affected by: Uncontrolled Resource Consumption. The impact is: denial of service. The component is: function jsiValueGetString (jsiUtils.c). The attack vector is: executing crafted javascript code. The fixed version is: after c…

item.title: CVE-2019-1010174
item.description: CImg The CImg Library v.2.3.3 and earlier is affected by: command injection. The impact is: RCE. The component is: load_network() function. The attack vector is: Loading an image from a user-controllable url can lead to command injection, because no…

item.title: CVE-2019-1010176
item.description: JerryScript commit 4e58ccf68070671e1fff5cd6673f0c1d5b80b166 is affected by: Buffer Overflow. The impact is: denial of service and possibly arbitrary code execution. The component is: function lit_char_to_utf8_bytes (jerry-core/lit/lit-char-helpers.c:…

item.title: CVE-2019-1010182
item.description: yaml-rust 0.4.0 and earlier is affected by: Uncontrolled Recursion. The impact is: Denial of service by impossible to catch abort. The component is: YamlLoader::load_from_str function. The attack vector is: Parsing of a malicious YAML document. The f…

item.title: CVE-2019-1010183
item.description: serde serde_yaml 0.6.0 to 0.8.3 is affected by: Uncontrolled Recursion. The impact is: Denial of service by aborting. The component is: from_* functions (all deserialization functions). The attack vector is: Parsing a malicious YAML file. The fixed v…

item.title: CVE-2019-1010178
item.description: Fred MODX Revolution < 1.0.0-beta5 is affected by: Incorrect Access Control - CWE-648. The impact is: Remote Code Execution. The component is: assets/components/fred/web/elfinder/connector.php. The attack vector is: Uploading a PHP file or change dat…

item.title: CVE-2019-1010179
item.description: PHKP including commit 88fd9cfdf14ea4b6ac3e3967feea7bcaabb6f03b is affected by: Improper Neutralization of Special Elements used in a Command ('Command Injection'). The impact is: It is possible to manipulate gpg-keys or execute commands remotely. The…

item.title: CVE-2019-1010189
item.description: mgetty prior to version 1.2.1 is affected by: Infinite Loop. The impact is: DoS, the program does never terminates. The component is: g3/g32pbm.c. The attack vector is: Local, the user should open a specially crafted file. The fixed version is: 1.2.1…

item.title: CVE-2019-1010191
item.description: marginalia < 1.6 is affected by: SQL Injection. The impact is: The impact is a injection of any SQL queries when a user controller argument is added as a component. The component is: Affects users that add a component that is user controller, for ins…

item.title: CVE-2019-1010193
item.description: hisiphp 1.0.8 is affected by: Cross Site Scripting (XSS).

item.title: CVE-2019-1010190
item.description: mgetty prior to 1.2.1 is affected by: out-of-bounds read. The impact is: DoS, the program may crash if the memory is not mapped. The component is: putwhitespan() in g3/pbm2g3.c. The attack vector is: Local, the victim must open a specially crafted fi…

item.title: CVE-2019-1010180
item.description: GNU gdb All versions is affected by: Buffer Overflow - Out of bound memory access. The impact is: Deny of Service, Memory Disclosure, and Possible Code Execution. The component is: The main gdb module. The attack vector is: Open an ELF for debugging.…

item.title: CVE-2019-1010177
item.description: Jsish 2.4.70 2.047 is affected by: Use After Free. The impact is: denial of service and possibly arbitrary code execution. The component is: function Jsi_RegExpNew (jsi/jsiRegexp.c:39). The attack vector is: executing crafted javascript code. The fix…

item.title: CVE-2019-1010163
item.description: Socusoft Co Photo 2 Video Converter 8.0.0 is affected by: Buffer Overflow - Local shell-code execution and Denial of Service. The impact is: Local privilege escalation (dependant upon conditions), shell code execution and denial-of-service. The compo…

item.title: CVE-2019-1010199
item.description: ServiceStack ServiceStack Framework 4.5.14 is affected by: Cross Site Scripting (XSS). The impact is: JavaScrpit is reflected in the server response, hence executed by the browser. The component is: the query used in the GET request is prone. The att…

item.title: CVE-2019-1010200
item.description: Voice Builder Prior to commit c145d4604df67e6fc625992412eef0bf9a85e26b and f6660e6d8f0d1d931359d591dbdec580fef36d36 is affected by: CWE-78: Improper Neutralization of Special Elements used in an OS Command ('OS Command Injection'). The impact is: Rem…

item.title: CVE-2019-1010201
item.description: Jeesite 1.2.7 is affected by: SQL Injection. The impact is: sensitive information disclosure. The component is: updateProcInsIdByBusinessId() function in src/main/java/com.thinkgem.jeesite/modules/act/ActDao.java has SQL Injection vulnerability. The…

item.title: CVE-2019-1010173
item.description: Jsish 2.4.84 2.0484 is affected by: Reachable Assertion. The impact is: denial of service. The component is: function Jsi_ValueArrayIndex (jsiValue.c:366). The attack vector is: executing crafted javascript code. The fixed version is: after commit 73…

item.title: CVE-2019-1010202
item.description: Jeesite 1.2.7 is affected by: XML External Entity (XXE). The impact is: sensitive information disclosure. The component is: convertToModel() function in src/main/java/com.thinkgem.jeesite/modules/act/service/ActProcessService.java. The attack vector…

item.title: CVE-2019-1010171
item.description: Jsish 2.4.83 2.0483 is affected by: Nullpointer dereference. The impact is: denial of service. The component is: function jsi_DumpFunctions (jsiEval.c:567). The attack vector is: executing crafted javascript code. The fixed version is: 2.4.84.

item.title: CVE-2019-1010170
item.description: Jsish 2.4.77 2.0477 is affected by: Use After Free. The impact is: denial of service. The component is: function Jsi_ObjFree (jsiObj.c:230). The attack vector is: executing crafted javascript code. The fixed version is: 2.4.78.

item.title: CVE-2019-1010169
item.description: Jsish 2.4.77 2.0477 is affected by: Out-of-bounds Read. The impact is: denial of service. The component is: function lexer_getchar (jsiLexer.c:9). The attack vector is: executing crafted javascript code. The fixed version is: 2.4.78.

item.title: CVE-2019-1010204
item.description: GNU binutils gold gold v1.11-v1.16 (GNU binutils v2.21-v2.31.1) is affected by: Improper Input Validation, Signed/Unsigned Comparison, Out-of-bounds Read. The impact is: Denial of service. The component is: gold/fileread.cc:497, elfcpp/elfcpp_file.h:…

item.title: CVE-2019-1010205
item.description: LINAGORA hublin latest (commit 72ead897082403126bf8df9264e70f0a9de247ff) is affected by: Directory Traversal. The impact is: The vulnerability allows an attacker to access any file (with a fixed extension) on the server. The component is: A web-view…

item.title: CVE-2019-1010206
item.description: OSS Http Request (Apache Cordova Plugin) 6 is affected by: Missing SSL certificate validation. The impact is: certificate spoofing. The component is: use this library when https communication. The attack vector is: certificate spoofing.

item.title: CVE-2019-1010162
item.description: jsish 2.4.74 2.0474 is affected by: CWE-476: NULL Pointer Dereference. The impact is: denial of service. The component is: function Jsi_StrcmpDict (jsiChar.c:121). The attack vector is: The victim must execute crafted javascript code. The fixed versi…

item.title: CVE-2019-1010155 🤔
item.description: D-Link DSL-2750U 1.11 is affected by: Authentication Bypass. The impact is: denial of service and information leakage. The component is: login. NOTE: Third parties dispute this issues as not being a vulnerability because although the wizard is access…
